skills.primary_deduction: Slight pike in round-off, legs slightly apart in BHS, slight pike in tuck, small hop on landing.
Insufficient split amplitude (below 150 degrees), slight bend in back knee.
Slight pike in round-off, legs slightly apart in BHS, slight arch/loose body in layout, small hop on landing.

coaching_summary: This routine demonstrates foundational tumbling skills with good height. However, consistent attention to detail in body lines, achieving full amplitude on leaps, and sticking landings without hops are critical areas for improvement. The artistry could benefit from more dynamic changes and stronger facial expression to truly captivate the judges.
top_3_fixes: Maintain tight body lines (straight legs, pointed toes) throughout all tumbling passes to eliminate form deductions.
Achieve full 180-degree split amplitude on all leaps, ensuring straight legs and pointed toes.
Focus on sticking all landings cleanly without hops or steps, and enhance artistry with varied dynamics and expression.
